# SSE transport tests
# Tests Server-Sent Events transport functionality

# Set test environment
env MCP_TOOL_TIMEOUT=15s

# Test that tools can handle SSE-like data structures
exec bash -c 'echo "{\"jsonrpc\": \"2.0\", \"id\": 1, \"method\": \"tools/list\", \"params\": {}}" | mcp-probe'
stdout 'jsonrpc'

# Test mcpspy can parse SSE-style messages
exec bash -c 'echo "{\"jsonrpc\": \"2.0\", \"id\": 2, \"method\": \"initialize\", \"params\": {\"protocolVersion\": \"2025-03-26\"}}" | mcpspy --pretty'
stdout 'initialize'
